steps.title: Read the coordinates
steps.content: The graph uses $x$ for Player 1's points and $y$ for Player 2's points. The point $(49,0)$ means Player 1 earns $49$ points and Player 2 earns $0$ points.

steps.title: Match the context
steps.content: There are $49$ questions total, so Player 1 earning $49$ points means Player 1 answered every question correctly. Player 2 earns no points in that case. The answer is B.
